course_title: INTRODUCTION TO RANDOM SIGNAL ANALYSIS AND STATISTICS
description: Introduction to probability, random variables, and random processes. Confidence intervals, introduction to experimental design and hypothesis testing. Statistical averages, correlation, and spectral analysis for wide sense stationary processes. Random signals and noise in linear systems.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 203or330) or member of Engineering Guest Students
